landing.title: Scrum Poker Cards
landing.subtitle: Estimate together, with style.
landing.seoDescription: Open-source planning poker with illustrated cards by Redbooth. Create a session, share the link, estimate stories as a team — all in real-time, right in your browser.

about.title: About Scrum Poker Cards
about.intro: A free, fun planning poker tool for agile teams.
about.thanksBody: The beautiful card illustrations that inspired this project were created by the team at <1>Redbooth</1>. They designed these playful planning poker cards for their own sprint planning — each card has an idiom that matches the effort level (like "Piece of cake" for a 2, or "Here be dragons" for the unknown).
about.thanksLicense: They generously shared them under <1>Creative Commons Attribution (CC BY 3.0)</1>. The <3>original repository</3> has the card designs in SVG, PNG, and print-ready formats. Thank you, Redbooth!
about.builtBy: This web app was built by <1>Luiz Tanure</1> — who forked the original card designs years ago, loved the illustrations, and decided to turn them into a real-time multiplayer poker tool. The source code is on <3>GitHub</3>.
about.noAds: No accounts, no ads. Just estimate and have fun.
about.contactBody: Found a bug? Have a feature idea? Open an <1>issue on GitHub</1> or reach out to <3>@letanure</3>.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy. Here's what we do and don't do:
privacy.collectBody: Anonymous usage analytics via PostHog to understand how the app is used. No personal data is collected.
privacy.dontCollectBody: No accounts, no emails, no cookies for tracking, no personal information.
privacy.sessionBody: All poker sessions are ephemeral. They exist only in memory while players are connected. Nothing is stored on disk or in a database.
privacy.nameBody: The name you enter is stored only in your browser's localStorage for convenience. It never leaves your device except during an active session.
privacy.errorBody: We use Sentry to catch bugs. Error reports may contain technical information but no personal data.
